name: Perpetual Equity Investment Company Limited
analysis: PIC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.1700, stop A$1.1385, target A$1.2645 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
